let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G) { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, k0) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, k0, w0) } }

goal: is_transitive[G](add_subgroup_rel[G](h)) = forall(x0: G, x1: G, x2: G) { add_subgroup_rel(h, x0, x1) and add_subgroup_rel(h, x1, x2) implies add_subgroup_rel(h, x0, x2) }
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = is_transitive[T0](x0) }[G](add_subgroup_rel[G](h))
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G, k1: G) { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, k0) and add_subgroup_rel(h, k0, k1) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, k1) } }
let w1: G satisfy { exists(k2: G) { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, w1) and add_subgroup_rel(h, w1, k2) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, k2) } }
let w2: G satisfy { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, w1) and add_subgroup_rel(h, w1, w2) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, w2) }

function[T0: AddGroup](x0: AddSubgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not add_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) or not add_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x2, x3) or add_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x3) }[G](h, w0, lib(functions).identity_fn(w1), w2)
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[G](w1)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not is_transitive[T0](x0) or not is_symmetric[T0](x0) or not is_reflexive[T0](x0) or is_equivalence[T0](x0) }[G](add_subgroup_rel[G](h))

function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not QuotientRelation.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: QuotientRelation[T0]) { QuotientRelation.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[QuotientRelation[T0]](k0) } }[G](add_subgroup_rel[G](h))

goal: a + b - (ap + bp) = a + b + -(ap + bp)
proof: function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[G](a + b, ap + bp)
function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -x0 + -x1 = -(x1 + x0) }[G](bp, ap)

function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0, x4: T0, x5: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or not x0(x4, x5) or x0(x1(x2, x4), x1(x3, x5)) } = respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x1) }[G](add_subgroup_rel[G](h), G.add)
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G, k1: G, k2: G) { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, k0) and add_subgroup_rel(h, k1, k2) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, w0 + k1, k0 + k2) } }
let w1: G satisfy { exists(k3: G, k4: G) { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, w1) and add_subgroup_rel(h, k3, k4) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, w0 + k3, w1 + k4) } }
let w2: G satisfy { exists(k5: G) { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, w1) and add_subgroup_rel(h, w2, k5) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, w0 + w2, w1 + k5) } }
let w3: G satisfy { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, w1) and add_subgroup_rel(h, w2, w3) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, w0 + w2, w1 + w3) }

function[T0: AddCommGroup](x0: AddSubgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0, x4: T0) { not add_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) or not add_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x3, x4) or add_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1 + x3, x2 + x4) }[G](h, w0, w1, w2, w3)

let w1: G satisfy { add_subgroup_rel(h, w0, w1) and not add_subgroup_rel(h, -w0, -w1) }

function[T0: AddCommGroup](x0: QuotientOver[T0], x1: QuotientOver[T0], x2: AddSubgroup[T0]) { quotient_over_binary_op[T0](T0.add, x0, x1) = add_subgroup_quotient_add[T0](x2, x0, x1) }[G](quotient_over_mk(add_subgroup_quotient_relation[G](h), a), quotient_over_mk(add_subgroup_quotient_relation[G](h), b), h)
